x-enumeration-literals.name: Assessor
x-enumeration-literals.description: The person or entity responsible for carrying out the assessment.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Assessee
x-enumeration-literals.description: The individual or group being assessed.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Evaluator
x-enumeration-literals.description: In some cases, an evaluator may be distinct from the assessor. They may oversee or validate the quality and fairness of the assessment process.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Reviewer
x-enumeration-literals.description: A third-party or external individual who may review the assessment process or the results to provide an additional layer of objectivity

x-enumeration-literals.name: Stakeholder
x-enumeration-literals.description: Individuals or groups that have an interest in the outcome of the assessment, even if they are not directly involved.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Observer
x-enumeration-literals.description: Monitors qualification process without direct involvement

x-enumeration-literals.name: Decision Authority
x-enumeration-literals.description: Approves or rejects based on assessment outcome
